name: Code Repository Secret Detection
description: Detects and remediates secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens, private keys) committed to source code repositories. Riggs AI analyzes the alert to classify the secret type and assess exposure risk. Confirmed secrets trigger immediate credential rotation, commit history cleanup guidance, repository access audit, and developer notification. Includes an approval gate before rotating production credentials. Designed for DevSecOps and SOC teams.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation ticket for secret removal and credential rotation tracking

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify developer, DevSecOps team, and SOC of secret exposure

data.title: Secret Detected in Repository
data.summary: Triggers on secret detection alerts from code scanning tools

data.title: AI Secret Exposure Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI classifies the secret type, assesses exposure risk, and checks for usage in the wild

config.custom_instructions: Classify the secret type (API key, password, token, private key, connection string). Determine if the repository is public or private. Assess whether the credential has been used maliciously. Check commit history for exposure duration.

data.title: Active Secret Exposed?
data.summary: Branch based on whether the detected secret is active and poses risk

data.title: Production Credential?
data.summary: Check if the exposed secret is a production environment credential

data.title: Approve Production Credential Rotation
data.summary: Requires approval before rotating production credentials to avoid service disruption

data.title: Create Rotation & Cleanup Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for credential rotation and commit history cleanup

config.title: SECRET EXPOSED: {{$.nodes.crs-2.result.secret_type}} in {{$.trigger.alert.repository}}

data.title: Notify Developer & DevSecOps
data.summary: Alert the commit author and DevSecOps team about the exposed secret

data.title: Non-Prod: Create Cleanup Ticket
data.summary: Create a lower-priority ticket for non-production secret cleanup

config.title: Secret Cleanup: {{$.nodes.crs-2.result.secret_type}} in {{$.trigger.alert.repository}}

data.title: Close Alert — Inactive Secret
data.summary: Secret is expired, revoked, or test-only — no action needed

config.note: Secret detection alert reviewed by Riggs AI. The detected credential is inactive (expired, already revoked, or test-only). No rotation required. Closing alert.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Code repository secret detection and response workflow finished

config.summary: Code repository secret detection and remediation completed
